prompt: Design a brand identity for a preschool learning app using the cheerful characters from Image 1 and the soft pastel palette in Image 2.
prompt_refined: Generate an app logo for a preschool learning application. The logo must prominently feature the cheerful, 3D-rendered giraffe and zebra characters from Image 1. All visual elements, including the characters, background, and any integrated text (e.g., a placeholder app name like 'Tiny Tots' in a playful, child-friendly font), must exclusively use the soft pastel color palette provided in Image 2. The overall composition should be inviting and cohesive, suitable for a brand identity icon.
objects: Playful, child-friendly font applied to text
Soft pastel color palette applied to all elements
